bead.title: Failure-mode taxonomy: classify execution failures by kind in evidence
bead.description:
## Scope
Classify execution failures by mode in the evidence schema so measurement can aggregate by failure type.

## Context
Known failure modes from production runs: context overflow/long-context hang, merge conflict, test failure, build failure (shipped unbuilt code), timeout, auth/quota error, no changes produced. Currently these are all just "task_failed" in result.json.

## Files to touch
- cli/internal/agent/execute_bead.go — classify failure mode from agent error/exit patterns
- cli/internal/agent/types.go — add FailureMode to result types if needed

## Depends on
ddx-4cdb9600 (tier-success command consumes failure_mode)
bead.acceptance: (1) result.json gains a failure_mode field (empty on success) populated by the orchestrator from known patterns: context_overflow, merge_conflict, test_failure, build_failure, timeout, auth_error, no_changes, unknown. (2) ddx agent metrics tier-success includes failure_mode breakdown in its output. (3) cd cli && go test ./internal/agent -run TestFailureMode -count=1 passes. (4) No regressions in cd cli && go test ./internal/agent -count=1.
